title: epakouo #1873
definition:
1) to give ear to, listen to
    1a) to perceive by the ear
 2) to listen to
    2a) to hear with favour, grant one's request
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to give ear to, listen to
    1a) to perceive by the ear
 2) to listen to
    2a) to hear with favour, grant one's request

    NASB:  to listen to, to hearken to:
